name: Shanghai HIUV New Materials Co.,Ltd
summary: Shanghai HIUV New Materials Co.,Ltd engages in the research and development, manufacture, and sale of film materials and products in China. It provides ethylene-vinyl acetate copolymer, electronic industry, and medical films, as well as POE and PVDF films. The company also offers technical support and solutions for customers in various fields. Its products are used primarily by power generation group and first-line PV module manufacturers. The company was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Shanghai, China.
